summary: Tested Kalkulation Historie feature - all backend APIs and frontend UI working correctly. POST /api/kalkulation saves calculations, GET /api/kalkulation/{id} returns history sorted by date descending (max 20), GET /api/kalkulation/{id}/latest returns most recent. KalkulationPanel pre-fills from last calculation, saves to history on apply, shows toggleable history section with expandable entries, and 'Diese Kalkulation laden' button loads historical values.
passed_tests: POST /api/kalkulation saves full calculation entry to DB with all fields
GET /api/kalkulation/{article_id} returns history sorted by date descending
GET /api/kalkulation/{article_id}/latest returns empty object for new article
GET /api/kalkulation/{article_id} returns empty list for new article
Saved kalkulation entry contains all required fields (EK, time entries, rates, sonstige, surcharges, calculated values)
KalkulationPanel pre-fills values from last calculation when opened (EK=20, Meister=2h, Geselle=3h)
Clicking 'VK-Preis übernehmen' saves calculation to history AND updates article price
Success toast 'VK-Preis für X auf Y € aktualisiert' appears after apply
Historie toggle button shows entry count badge (e.g., '1', '2')
Historie toggle button toggles history section visibility
Each history entry shows VK price, date, and summary (EK, Lohn, Material%, Gewinn%)
Expanding history entry shows full details (all time entries with rates, sonstige, surcharges)
'Diese Kalkulation laden' button in expanded entry re-fills form with that entry's values
Toast 'Kalkulation geladen' appears after loading from history
Multiple calculations stack in history (tested: 1 entry → 2 entries after new calculation)
Calculation comparison shows difference from current VK (green for increase, red for decrease)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend kalkulation.py correctly excludes MongoDB _id from responses
KalkulationPanel.jsx properly handles loading state and pre-fills values
History entries are correctly sorted by created_at descending
All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: Created test calculations for article 'Einrüstkosten/Sicherheitsrelevant' - now has 2+ history entries
context_for_next_testing_agent: Kalkulation Historie feature fully tested and working. The KalkulationPanel in document editor sidebar (/quotes/edit/{id}) now: 1) Loads latest calculation via GET /api/kalkulation/{id}/latest on mount, 2) Pre-fills all form fields from last calc, 3) Saves to history via POST /api/kalkulation when applying price, 4) Shows toggleable history section with expandable entries. Test article 'Einrüstkosten/Sicherheitsrelevant' has multiple history entries. Backend collection: kalkulation_historie.
